title: What You Admit Changes Everything
pressure: The repair meeting exposed the hesitation and bypass pattern. You can feel that your behavior under pressure contributed to it. The assistant is waiting to see what you acknowledge.
tradeoff: Taking full ownership may feel like losing authority. Limiting ownership protects your position but may keep the pattern alive.

action_contract.description: Decide how much ownership you will take for the breakdown and how visible that ownership becomes.

air_logic.success: Your ownership changes how the team engages under pressure.
air_logic.miss: The team hears your words but does not change behavior.

forced_reset.trigger: The repair conversation directly exposed your role in the pattern.
forced_reset.action: You must decide what you acknowledge publicly.

choices.label: State clearly that your behavior contributed to hesitation and bypassing
choices.subtext: This risks your authority but aligns with what actually happened.

choices.label: Acknowledge the issue but emphasize shared responsibility
choices.subtext: This feels balanced and protects your position.

choices.label: Focus on how the team can improve moving forward
choices.subtext: This avoids staying in the past and keeps momentum.

choices.label: Explain your intent and why decisions were made quickly
choices.subtext: This helps others understand your perspective.

A.escalation_text: When you take ownership, the assistant looks surprised and slightly relieved. The room becomes quiet as others process the shift.

second_choices.label: Reduce the statement to avoid overexposure
second_choices.cost: You regain control but weaken the impact of your ownership.

second_choices.label: Stay with the ownership and invite response
second_choices.cost: You remain exposed and may hear difficult feedback.

action_decision.prompt: Not intention — what you will do next.
action_decision.context: Your ownership created a shift, but it needs reinforcement.

choices.label: Within 24 hours, follow up with the assistant and define one behavior change you will repeat

meaning.description: You are reinforcing ownership with behavior.

choices.label: Let the statement stand and observe whether the team adjusts

meaning.description: You are relying on words without reinforcement.

B.escalation_text: The assistant nods but does not change behavior in the next procedure. Hesitation continues in subtle ways.

second_choices.label: Maintain shared responsibility framing
second_choices.cost: You keep authority balance, but the pattern remains unclear.

second_choices.label: Revisit and take clearer ownership
second_choices.cost: You must shift your earlier position.

action_decision.prompt: Not intention — what you will do next.
action_decision.context: Your balanced statement did not change behavior.

choices.label: Within 24 hours, clarify your role in the pattern with the assistant

meaning.description: You are increasing clarity after partial ownership.
You are maintaining balance over clarity.

C.escalation_text: The team agrees on improvements, but the next busy case brings back the same hesitation pattern.

second_choices.label: Continue focusing on forward improvements
second_choices.cost: You keep momentum but avoid ownership.

second_choices.label: Pause and acknowledge your role
second_choices.cost: You must slow down and revisit the past.

action_decision.prompt: Not intention — what you will do next.
action_decision.context: Forward focus did not change behavior under pressure.

choices.label: Within 24 hours, identify and communicate one behavior you will change

meaning.description: You are shifting from intention to action.
You are maintaining forward motion without ownership.

D.escalation_text: Your explanation is understood, but the assistant still hesitates. The behavior pattern does not shift.

second_choices.label: Continue explaining decisions
second_choices.cost: Understanding increases, but behavior does not.

action_decision.prompt: Not intention — what you will do next.

choices.label: Within 24 hours, communicate one ownership-based change

meaning.description: You are moving from explanation to action.
You are staying in explanation mode.
